response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack engineering experience with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and cloud technologies, particularly at Stripe. While his direct GenAI and RAG experience is not explicitly detailed, his technical leadership, open-source contributions, and work with MCP (Model Context Protocol) suggest adaptability. However, his background leans more toward general software development than specialized AI systems, which may require deeper evaluation.
strengths: Extensive full-stack engineering experience with TypeScript, Python-adjacent languages (DLang), and cloud platforms (AWS).
Proven technical leadership and mentorship, including contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at Stripe.
Strong open-source portfolio and community engagement, demonstrating initiative and deep technical expertise.
concerns: Limited explicit experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization techniques.
AI-related work appears secondary to broader software development roles, raising questions about depth of specialization.
No mention of advanced degrees (Master's/PhD) in AI or related fields, which are preferred for this role.
